evidenceBoundary: Planning-owned structured handoff only. No execution evidence exists yet for Feature 011; this greenfield feature has no prior implementation, so report.md carries scenario/scope evidence placeholders only. Every changed behavior still requires focused red/green proof, the declared persistent regression, and the broader checkpoint. Pure-helper math is proven in scripts/selftest.mjs (functional/unit, no browser); browser-functional invariants use the real production route in tests/volatility-sizing-lab.spec.mjs with no request interception or fixture substitution. rlvol.js and tests/volatility-sizing-lab.spec.mjs and the RLVOL selftest group do not exist yet and are implementation-owned; the traceability guard is therefore expected to be nonzero until they are authored.

commandCatalog.CMD-FIRST-RED: node -e 'const assert=require("node:assert/strict");const input=require("./tests/fixtures/volatility-sizing/commonjs-determinism-input.json");const sentinel=Object.freeze({owner:"preexisting-global"});globalThis.RLVOL=sentinel;delete require.cache[require.resolve("./rlvol.js")];const RLVOL=require("./rlvol.js");assert.strictEqual(globalThis.RLVOL,sentinel);const first=RLVOL.buildVolDecisionRead(structuredClone(input));const second=RLVOL.buildVolDecisionRead(structuredClone(input));assert.equal(first.computedAt,input.decisionTime);assert.equal(second.computedAt,input.decisionTime);assert.equal(RLVOL.canonicalize(first),RLVOL.canonicalize(second));assert.equal(first.decisionId,second.decisionId);console.log("PASS RLVOL CommonJS import preserves the existing global and explicit decisionTime is deterministic")'
commandCatalog.CMD-PAGE-VOL: PAGE=volatility-sizing-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'

protectedCanaries.assertion: provider credential is session-only while non-secret rlData remains durable
registered tools expose no duplicate provider credential setter migration or durable storage access
registered tools expose no credential-bearing provider URL transport
Bond Regime browser route and one-owner-read behavior remain unchanged
Causal Rotation browser route and validator contracts remain unchanged
Every existing scripts/selftest.mjs group (RLFX, RLVALID, causal, bond, credential, registry, market brief) remains a byte-preserved immutable assertion; the RLVOL group is purely additive

tests.testTitle: RLVOL CommonJS import preserves the existing global and explicit decisionTime is deterministic
tests.description: Cheapest first red/green: production CommonJS purity, no globalThis.RLVOL mutation, computedAt equals the input decisionTime, and one deterministic decisionId across two runs.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL EWMA and GARCH forecasts keep high persistence elevated above the long-run and stay typed forecast
tests.description: ewmaVar/ewmaVol closed-form recursion and forecastTerm keep a high-persistence one-day-ahead forecast elevated versus the long-run level; every point is typed forecast.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL sizing multiplier is min(cap, targetVol over max(floor, forecastVol)) with a worked example
tests.description: sizingMultiplier(0.15, 0.30, 2.0, 0.05) is approximately 0.5 and the decision carries a worked cash example on a user notional with the conditional caveat.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL near-zero forecast vol floors the multiplier at the cap and never diverges
tests.description: Adversarial: forecastVol approaching zero floors at policy.sizing.forecastVolFloor so min(cap, targetVol/floor) hits the cap; the multiplier never returns a non-finite or unbounded value.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL GARCH fit is a labeled lightweight optimizer and never institutional MLE
tests.description: garch11Fit returns fit diagnostics tagged as a lightweight in-browser optimizer with quality 'fitted'; no output labels the fit as maximum-likelihood or institutional-grade.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL non-convergent GARCH resolves to the labeled EWMA closed-form fallback
tests.description: Adversarial: a GARCH fit that breaches stationarity alpha+beta<1 or the iteration/tolerance cap returns FIT_NONCONVERGENT and the estimator resolves to the labeled EWMA closed form, never a broken or silent value.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL material EWMA-vs-GARCH persistence divergence opens an evidence conflict and is never averaged
tests.description: When EWMA lambda and a GARCH alpha+beta imply materially different persistence, the decision opens EWMA_GARCH_PERSISTENCE_DIVERGENCE and surfaces both; no averaged single persistence is emitted.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL realized reads are typed realized and never relabeled forecast in the owner read
tests.description: realizedVol produces a kind 'realized' observation with estimator 'realized-rolling'; normalizeObservation and projectVolToolRead keep forecast and realized separate and never interchange the pairing.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL longer history is best-effort caveated and projects no multi-decade single-path number
tests.description: A decision built from a 10y/max history range carries a best-effort limitation and the owner-read projection contains no reproduced multi-decade single-path outperformance number.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL volPercentile always returns its trailing windowRef and regimeBand maps thresholds
tests.description: volPercentile returns a non-null windowRef (observation count plus start/end dates) and refuses to emit a percentile without it; regimeBand maps a percentile to calm/normal/elevated/storm on the policy thresholds.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL detectManagedSuppression flags peg band or halt low volatility as managed-suppressed
tests.description: Adversarial: a zero-return fraction, sub-floor daily range, or identical-close run trips detectManagedSuppression so the read is marked MANAGED_SUPPRESSED and never resolves to a calm/full-size band.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL below-minimum coverage is INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY with exact required-versus-available counts
tests.description: buildVolDecisionRead with valid returns below minForecastObs returns an unavailable state carrying INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY and exact used-versus-required counts; no forecast/regime/sizing number is published.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL projectVolToolRead emits summary-only owner read with no raw bars or restricted payload
tests.description: projectVolToolRead builds a versioned rl-tool-read/v1 owner read with summary metrics only (window-visible percentile, typed forecast and realized values) and contains no raw bars, restricted payload, or source URL beyond the tool deep-link.

tests.testTitle: Full selftest is green with the additive RLVOL foundation group and every existing canary preserved
tests.description: node scripts/selftest.mjs passes the complete additive RLVOL group and preserves BASE-SEC, RLFX, RLVALID, causal, bond, registry, and market-brief canary assertions byte-for-byte; the pass count does not decrease.

tests.testTitle: Shared-fixture canary: existing selftest groups and the Bond/Causal/Provider browser suites stay byte-preserved before broad reruns
tests.description: Independent canary: every existing scripts/selftest.mjs group plus the Bond, Causal, and provider-credential browser suites run green before any broad suite rerun, proving the additive RLVOL group and selftest edits do not regress a shared fixture/bootstrap contract.

tests.testTitle: tool registry parity: volatility-sizing-lab is registered identically across tools.json, index.html, and rlnav.js
tests.description: The registry-parity selftest group asserts identity, order, nav label, icon, and file basename match for volatility-sizing-lab across tools.json, index.html, and rlnav.js.

tests.testTitle: RLVOL validateUniverse accepts the closed volatility-sizing universe and rejects unknown keys
tests.description: validateUniverse(volatility-sizing-universe.json) returns a closed frozen universe and rejects unknown keys, duplicate/invalid asset identity, out-of-range policy values, and a violated calmMaxPct<normalMaxPct<elevatedMaxPct ordering.

tests.testTitle: Full selftest stays green after registration with registry and universe assertions added
tests.description: node scripts/selftest.mjs stays green with the registration and universe assertions added and every prior registry canary preserved.

tests.testTitle: Regression E2E: the registered volatility route is reachable and renders through the real nav
tests.description: Standing registration regression: a broken registry entry for volatility-sizing-lab fails the real-route suite because the page can no longer be reached through the registered nav (transitive registration regression via the Scope 3 real-route suite).

scopes.scopeName: Volatility Sizing Lab Tool UI (Simple + Power)

tests.testTitle: Volatility page inline scripts parse and every referenced element id is literally present
tests.description: CMD-PAGE-VOL proves every inline script in volatility-sizing-lab.html parses and every getElementById reference resolves to a literal id in the page.
tests.command: PAGE=volatility-sizing-lab.html node -e '... inline-script and id integrity (see commandCatalog.CMD-PAGE-VOL) ...'

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-002: storm-gauge percentile always renders its trailing window and observation count
tests.description: Real same-origin route asserts the regime percentile always renders its trailing window and observation count and never a cross-asset-comparable absolute score.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-005: no directional element appears in Simple or Power
tests.description: Real route asserts no panel, label, badge, axis, marker, or summary implies price direction, a target, a top, or a bottom in either Simple or Power.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-007: backtest is a deep-link with no in-tool verdict
tests.description: Real route asserts the backtest CTA deep-links to strategy-validation-lab with context and renders no in-tool single-path performance verdict.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-008: managed-suppressed history is marked, not calm/full-size
tests.description: Real route asserts a peg/band/halt history renders a managed-suppressed mark and withholds or caveats sizing, never a calm band or automatic full size.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-009: insufficient history is unavailable with exact counts
tests.description: Real route asserts below-minimum coverage renders Unavailable with exact required-versus-available counts and never a zero, neutral, calm, or full-size default.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-010: Simple and Power share one decision identity
tests.description: Real route asserts Simple and Power render the same decisionId and identical headline forecast, regime, persistence, and multiplier for one asset, window, and controls.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-004: near-zero forecast vol floors the multiplier at the cap
tests.description: Real route regression confirms the rendered multiplier hits its cap under a near-zero forecast vol and never displays a diverging or non-finite value.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-006: GARCH fit is labeled a lightweight optimizer not MLE
tests.description: Real route regression confirms the rendered GARCH parameters carry the lightweight-optimizer label and no institutional-MLE wording.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-011: non-convergent GARCH falls back to labeled EWMA
tests.description: Real route regression confirms a non-convergent GARCH renders the labeled EWMA fallback numbers rather than a broken or blank GARCH value.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-013: realized is never relabeled a forecast in the owner read
tests.description: Real route regression confirms the realized read renders with a realized typing badge and the published owner read never presents it as a forward forecast.

tests.testTitle: Regression BS-014: longer history is caveated and reproduces no multi-decade claim
tests.description: Real route regression confirms selecting a longer history range renders a best-effort caveat and reproduces no single-path multi-decade outperformance number.

tests.testTitle: Cache-first partial paint renders synchronous non-blank canvases with text and table fallback
tests.description: Real route asserts first paint from cache before network completion, synchronous non-blank Power canvases (no requestAnimationFrame dependency), and a same-data table fallback present on the synchronous render path.

tests.testTitle: Controls recompute one decision without any market-data request
tests.description: Real route asserts a control change updates Simple, Power, summaries, and the owner read from one recompute and causes zero market-data requests.

tests.testTitle: Power canvases carry aria-label and same-data table on desktop and mobile
tests.description: Desktop 1440x1000 and mobile 390x844 runs assert every canvas has an aria-label, adjacent summary, and same-data table with no clipped controls or horizontal page overflow.

tests.testTitle: Full volatility-sizing-lab Playwright suite is green on the real route
tests.description: The complete tests/volatility-sizing-lab.spec.mjs suite passes on the real ephemeral same-origin server with no page.route or response interception.

tests.testTitle: Regression E2E: persistent scenario-specific real-route suite guards every Simple/Power behavior
tests.description: Standing regression guard: the persistent tests/volatility-sizing-lab.spec.mjs suite (15 cases) protects every Simple/Power behavior against regression on desktop and mobile.

scopes.scopeName: Owner Read Publication And Market Brief Wiring

tests.testTitle: RLVOL projectVolToolRead browser and headless parity carries no raw bars
tests.description: projectVolToolRead produces identical owner reads for the same input and decisionTime in browser and Node and carries only summary metrics with no raw bars or restricted payload.

tests.testTitle: Registered Volatility Sizing tool publishes one owner read and Market Brief renders it without recompute
tests.description: Real route asserts the tool publishes one versioned rl-tool-read/v1 owner read via RLDATA.putToolRead with no restricted payload, and Market Brief renders the window-visible regime/throttle line from it without recomputing the model.

tests.testTitle: Market Brief payload includes the registered volatility-sizing-lab owner read
tests.description: The committed Market Brief payload validator confirms registry-wide coverage includes volatility-sizing-lab and that a stale or unavailable owner read is rendered as a named coverage outcome, not an invented synthesis.

tests.testTitle: Registry-wide Market Brief coverage selftest includes the registered volatility owner read
tests.description: The market-brief registry-wide coverage selftest group confirms the volatility-sizing-lab owner read is included in the action-only payload contract.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime browser canary passes unchanged
tests.description: BASE-BOND-E2E: the Bond Regime browser suite passes unchanged, proving the additive volatility owner item does not regress a sibling registry consumer.

tests.testTitle: Causal Rotation browser canary passes unchanged
tests.description: BASE-CAUSAL-E2E: the Causal Rotation browser suite passes unchanged after the additive owner-read and Market Brief wiring.

tests.testTitle: Provider credential browser canary passes unchanged
tests.description: BASE-SEC-02/03: the provider credential browser suite passes unchanged, proving the new route adds no credential surface and no restricted-payload transport.

tests.testTitle: Full selftest and full volatility E2E regression are green with all canaries preserved
tests.description: node scripts/selftest.mjs and the full tests/volatility-sizing-lab.spec.mjs suite are green with BASE-SEC, bond, causal, registry, and market-brief canaries preserved and no decreased pass count.

tests.testTitle: Regression E2E: owner-read publish + Market Brief renders without recompute stays a standing cross-tool guard
tests.description: Standing cross-tool regression: the persistent owner-read publish + Brief-renders-without-recompute case (typeof window.RLVOL === undefined on the brief page) guards the cross-tool contract against regression.
